allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('realm-export.json'\)\); users=[u for u in data.get\('users',[]\) if u.get\('username'\)=='admin.user']; print\(json.dumps\(users, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST http://localhost:8081/realms/master/protocol/openid-connect/token -d grant_type=password -d client_id=admin-cli -d username=admin -d password=admin)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8081/realms/master/protocol/openid-connect/token -d grant_type=password -d client_id=admin-cli -d username=admin -d password=Admin@1234)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK' if 'access_token' in d else d\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('c:/Users/Avelino/Documents/GitHub/Projeto_IAM/realm-export.json'\)\); print\('Realm:', d.get\('realm'\)\); print\('Roles:', [r['name'] for r in d.get\('roles',{}\).get\('realm',[]\) if not r.get\('composite',False\) and not r['name'].startswith\('default'\)]\); print\('Groups:', [g['name'] for g in d.get\('groups',[]\)]\); print\('Clients:', [c['clientId'] for c in d.get\('clients',[]\) if not c.get\('clientId',''\).startswith\('broker'\) and not c.get\('clientId',''\).startswith\('realm'\)]\); users=[u.get\('username'\) for u in d.get\('users',[]\)]; print\('Users:', users\); print\('MFA required actions em users:', [\(u['username'], u.get\('requiredActions',[]\)\) for u in d.get\('users',[]\) if u.get\('requiredActions'\)]\); print\('Events enabled:', d.get\('eventsEnabled'\)\); print\('Admin events enabled:', d.get\('adminEventsEnabled'\)\); print\('Events listeners:', d.get\('eventsListeners'\)\)")
